vincibot.title: An application that provides control, programming and embedded machine learning capabilities for VinciBot.
vincibot.desc: Provides AI model training, graphical programming and Python text programming to meet the cognitive levels and learning needs of students of different ages. Based on hardware functions, it provides AI, camera, sensors, musical instrument playing, and various interesting programming methods, with built-in teaching cases and help center to help students quickly master the application.

nous.title: An application that provides control, programming and embedded machine learning capabilities for Nous.
nous.desc: Provides AI model training, graphical programming and Python text programming to meet the cognitive levels and learning needs of students of different ages. Based on hardware functions, it provides AI, building blocks, camera, sensors, musical instrument playing and various interesting programming methods, with built-in teaching cases and help center to help students quickly master the application.

matatacode.title: An application that provides control and programming for Tale bot pro and Coding Set.
matatacode.desc: Provides both graphical and icon-based programming methods to meet the cognitive development and learning needs of students of different ages. We can run and verify programs in a virtual environment through the built-in simulator, improving learning flexibility and practicality.

talemap.title: MatataCode (TaleMap) is a software designed for Tale-Bot Pro.
talemap.desc: The software contains two main functions: Design your story map, Story map library. An application that allows users to easily create unlimited interactive maps and scenes.

matataxplore.title: A microscope operation software designed for children to help them easily explore the microscopic world.
matataxplore.desc: Provides a professional, convenient and fun microscope experience, while stimulating children's curiosity and cultivating their interest in science, suitable for various educational environments and nature exploration activities.
